1. Start by placing the band around your thighs, just above the knee on both legs. 

2.Lie on your side, with your body propped up on one elbow, feet and knees stacked. Keeping your knees at 90 degrees, push your hips up and off the mat coming up into a side plank. 

3. Drive the top knee open a

name: Mini Band Clamshell with Internal Rotation
description:
1. Start by lying on your side, with knees bent, and Mini Band looped around your knees.

2. While keeping your heels together, slowly lift your top knee up and away from the floor. 

3. While keeping your top knee in position, raise your top foot up as high as you can.

4. Lower your heel bac

name: Mini Band Delt Raises
description:
1. Place the band around your wrists, with your hands out in front of your body. 

2. With your palms facing each other, raise your hands directly over head while keeping tension on the band. 

3. Slowly lower to the start position while maintaining tension on the band.

name: Mini Band Donkey Kicks
description:
1. Start on all fours, with the Mini Band looped around both thighs. You may choose to loop it around the midfoot to make this more challenging. 

2. Drive the bottom of one foot up towards the ceiling, without losing the position with the rest of your body. 

3. Slowly return to the start posit

name: Mini Band External Rotation
description: Hold a mini band in both hands with elbows bent. Rotate your forearms outward while keeping elbows at your sides.

name: Mini Band External Rotation with Scoop
description: Hold a mini band in both hands. Rotate your forearms outward, then scoop the band upward to shoulder height.

name: Mini Band Fencer Walk
description:
1. Place the band around the arches of both feet. 

2. Step forward with one foot, then bring your opposite foot forward slowly until the toe meets the middle of your front foot. 

3. Repeat for desired time without dragging your feet. 

4. Do the same on the opposite side.

name: Mini Band Fire Hydrants
description:
1. Start on all fours, with the Mini Band looped around both thighs. 

2. Slowly drive one knee outwards, away from your body, without losing your position with your upper body. 

3. Return to the start position and repeat on the opposite side.

name: Mini Band Forward Backward Zig Zag Walk
description:
1. Start by placing the Mini Band around your ankles and slightly bending your knees. 

2. Step forward and away from your body on a 45-degree angle. Slowly bring your other foot forward to meet the front foot. 

3. Using the other foot this time, step out in front and away from yourself in the

name: Mini Band Frog Pumps
description:
1. Start by lying on your back, with the Mini Band looped around your thighs. 

2. Bring the bottoms of your feet together, and bring them up towards your body as close as possible. 

3. Driving through the outside of the foot, push your hips up into the air while flexing your glutes. 

4. Slo

name: Mini Band Glute Bridge
description:
1. Start by placing the Mini Band around your knees, and lying on your back with feet planted flatly on the floor. 

2. While keeping tension on the band, drive your hips up towards the ceiling, while squeezing your glutes. 

3. Slowly return to the start position and repeat.

name: Mini Band Glute Kickback
description:
1. Start on all fours, with the MiniBand looped around the centre of both feet. 

2. Fully extend one leg backwards, squeezing the glute one you've reached as far as you can. 

3. Slow return to the start position under control. Repeat on the opposite side.

name: Mini Band Hip Lifted Clamshell
description:
1. Place the band around your thighs, just above the knees. 

2. Start on your side, with your elbow on the mat, your knees bent, and feet behind you. 

3. With your knees and feet stacked, drive your hips up off the mat, then lift the top knee while keeping the feet together. 

4. Slowly retu

name: Mini Band Jumping Jack
description:
1. Place the band around the arches of both feet. 

2. Perform a jumping jack by jumping your feet outwards  while reaching your hands up overhead and together. 

3. Jump back to the start position and repeat.

name: Mini Band Lateral Hops
description:
1. Start by placing the band around the arches of both feet. 

2. Push one foot out to the side while hopping sideways. 

3. Land softly and bring your feet back together slowly. 

4. Repeat on the other side.

name: Mini Band Lateral Lunge
description:
1. Start standing with feet shoulder-width apart. Place the band around both ankles. 

2. Step your foot out towards your right side and reach your hips back to control your descent. 

3. Push yourself back up to a standing position, then repeat on the same side.

name: Mini Band Lateral Squat Walk (Ankles)
description:
Place a mini band around your ankles. 

Stand with feet hip-width apart and lower into a squat position. Step to the side with one foot, then bring the other foot to follow, maintaining squat form and band tension. 

Repeat steps in one direction, then reverse. This exercise targets the glutes,

name: Mini Band Lateral Squat Walk (Feet)
description:
Place a mini band around your feet, just above the arches. 

Stand with feet hip-width apart and lower into a squat position. Step to the side with one foot, then bring the other foot to follow, maintaining squat form and band tension. 

Repeat steps in one direction, then reverse. This exercise

name: Mini Band Lateral Squat Walk (Knees)
description: Place a mini band just above your knees. Stand with feet hip-width apart and lower into a squat position. Step to the side with one foot, then bring the other foot to follow, maintaining squat form and band tension. Repeat steps in one direction, then reverse. This exercise targets the glutes, hips,

name: Mini Band Mountain Climbers
description:
1. Start in a plank position, with the Mini Band looped around the middle of both feet.

2. Slowly draw one knee in towards your chest, then return to the start position. 

3. Continue alternating sides, while maintaining a strong plank position.

name: Mini Band Pistol Squat
description:
1. Start by standing on one leg, with the band looped around both knees.  

2. Slowly reach your hips back while extending the free leg out in front of you. 

3. Return to the start position under control. Repeat on the opposite side.

name: Mini Band Plank Alternating Leg Lift
description:
1. Start in a plank position, with the Mini Band looped around both ankles.

2. Slowly drive one heel up towards the ceiling while squeezing the glutes. Return to the start position.

3. Continue alternating sides while maintaining a strong plank position.

name: Mini Band Plank Arm Abduction
description:
Place a mini band around your wrists and get into a plank position.

Keeping your core tight, move one hand out to the side, then return it to the start. 

Alternate arms, maintaining a strong plank position.

name: Mini Band Pop Squat
description:
Stand with a mini band around your thighs. 

Jump into a wide squat position, then quickly jump back to a standing position with feet together. 

Repeat the movement rapidly while maintaining tension in the band.

name: Mini Band Pull Aparts
description: Hold a mini band at shoulder height with arms extended. Pull it apart by squeezing your shoulder blades.

name: Mini Band Resisted Plank Hip Abduction
description:
Place a mini band around your ankles.

Get into a plank position with elbows directly under shoulders and body in a straight line. 

While maintaining the plank, lift one leg out to the side and tap your toe on the ground, then return to the starting position. 

Alternate legs. This exercise t

name: Mini Band Seated Abduction
description:
1) To perform this exercise, you‚Äôll want to ensure that you put the band around your thighs.

2) From there, sit at the edge of the bench so that you can press your knees apart.

3) Squeezing your glutes and sitting tall.

name: Mini Band Side Bear Crawl (Around Arms)
description:
1. Start with the band looped around both wrists, on all fours, with knees slightly elevated. 

2. In a slow and controlled manner, walk sideways. Reach your opposite arm and leg at the same time, without wagging hips from side to side. 

3. Repeat in the opposite direction.

name: Mini Band Side Bear Crawl (Around Legs)
description:
1. Start with the band looped around both knees, on all fours, with knees slightly elevated. 

2. In a slow and controlled manner, walk sideways. Reach your opposite arm and leg at the same time, without wagging hips from side to side. 

3. Repeat in the opposite direction.

name: Mini Band Side Lying Hip Abduction
description:
1. Start by lying on your side with the Mini Band looped around both ankles. If you need to make it easier, you can loop the band around the knees. 

2. Slowly raise the top foot up towards the ceiling, without rocking your body forwards or backwards. 

3. Return to the start position under cont

name: Mini Band Side Steps
description:
1. Start by placing the band around the arches of both feet. 

2. Soften your knees, and step one foot out to the side, then slowly step your opposite foot in the same direction. 

3. Keep an upright posture, and try to avoid dragging your feet. 

4. Repeat on the other side.

name: Mini Band Side Steps (Squat Stance)
description:
1. Start by placing the Mini Band around your ankles, and descending into a half-squat position. 

2. While keeping your knees in line with your toes, reach one foot out to the side. Step your opposite foot towards the first foot. 

3. Move in a slow and controlled fashion while trying not to mo

name: Mini Band Single Arm Tricep Extension
description: Anchor the band overhead. Perform tricep extensions with one arm, keeping your elbow close to your head.

name: Mini Band Single Leg Deadlift
description:
1. Start by standing holding the band, with the band looped around the centre of one foot. 

2. Slightly bend the knee of the leg with the band and reach the opposite leg backwards by driving your hips back. 

3. Slowly return to the start position by thrusting the hips forward while keeping a l

name: Mini Band Single Leg Glute Bridge
description:
1. Start by placing the Mini Band around your knees, and lying on your back with one foot planted flatly on the floor. 

2. While keeping tension on the band, drive your hips up towards the ceiling, while squeezing the glute of the pushing leg.

3. Slowly return to the start position and repeat

name: Mini Band Skaters
description:
Place a mini band around your ankles and stand with feet hip-width apart.

Jump laterally to one side, landing on one foot, then immediately jump to the other side. 

Keep your movements controlled and your core tight.

name: Mini Band Split Stance Band Bicep Curl
description: Step on a mini band. Perform bicep curls with alternating arms, keeping the band under tension.

name: Mini Band Split Stance Band Row
description: Step on a mini band in a split stance. Row the band handles toward your torso, keeping elbows close.

name: Mini Band Squat
description:
1. Start by standing with feet shoulder-width apart, with the band looped around both knees.  

2. Slowly reach your hips back and bend your knees like you're sitting in a chair. 

3. Return to the start position without letting the knees come inwards.

name: Mini Band Squat Jumps
description:
1. Start by standing with feet shoulder-width apart, with the band around both knees. 

2. Descend into a squat by reaching the hips back and bending the knees. 

3. Without letting the knees come inwards, push yourself up hard and jump into the air. 

4. Land under control, and repeat.

name: Mini Band Squat Thrust
description:
1. Start by placing the band around the arches of both feet. 

2. Reach down to place your hands on the floor then jump your feet back so you land in a plank position. 

3. Jump your feet forward and stand back up to return to the starting position.

name: Mini Band Standing Hip Abduction
description:
1. Place the Mini Band around your ankles on both sides. 

2. Start standing with feet shoulder-width apart. Drive one leg out and away from the body while keeping the knees straight. 

3. Slowly return to the start position, and repeat on the other side.

name: Mini Band Standing I's
description:
1. Start by placing the band around both wrists. 

2. Without arching the back, raise your hands up and outwards into an "I" position overhead. Return to the start position and repeat.

name: Mini Band Standing Y's
description:
1. Start by placing the band around both wrists. 

2. Without arching the back, raise your hands up and outwards into a "Y" position overhead. Return to the start position and repeat.

name: Mini Band Wall Sit
description:
1. Start by placing the band around both knees with your back against the wall.

2.Place your feet shoulder-width and slide your torso down the wall until you make a 90-degree angle with your hips and knees. 

3. Maintain this position for the desired time, without letting the knees collapse inw

name: Mini Band Wall Sit Marches
description:
1. Start by placing the band around both knees with your back against the wall.

2. Place your feet shoulder-width and slide your torso down the wall until you make a 90-degree angle with your hips and knees.

4. While maintaining this position, drive one knee upwards towards the chest. Slowly l

name: Mini Band Wall Sit with Abductions
description:
1. Start by placing the band around both knees with your back against the wall.

2. Place your feet shoulder-width and slide your torso down the wall until you make a 90-degree angle with your hips and knees. 

3. While maintaining this position, drive the knees outwards under control. Bring the

name: Mini Band Wall Sit Y's
description:
1. Start by placing the band around both wrists with your back against the wall.

2.Place your feet shoulder-width and slide your torso down the wall until you make a 90-degree angle with your hips and knees. 

3. While maintaining this position, raise the hands up and outwards into a "Y" positi

name: Mini Band Wall Slides
description:
1. Start by standing with your back against the wall, with the band around both wrists. 

2. Reach your hands overhead and place the back of your hands flat against the wall.

3. Bend your elbows to 90-degrees, then slowly reach all the way up overhead. Repeat.

name: Mini Band Wide to Narrow Jump Squat
description:
1. Start by standing with feet shoulder-width apart, with the band looped around both ankles. 

2. Jump out to a wide foot position, and descend downwards into a squat. 

3. Push yourself back up and jump back to a standing position. Repeat.

name: MiniBand Hip Flexion
description:
Place a mini band around your feet. 

Stand tall, lifting one knee toward your chest while keeping tension on the band. Lower and switch legs. 

Maintain balance and core engagement.

name: Modified Pretzel
description:
1. Start seated with your knees bend to 90 degrees.

2. You should have the outside of one knee on the floor, and the inside of the other knee on the floor also. 

3. Gently rotate your torso towards the leg with the outside of the knee on the floor. 

4. Breathe and relax in this position, en

name: Modified Pretzel Full Progression
description:
1. Start seated with one leg fully extended in front of you and the opposite leg bent to 90 degrees, with the inside of the knee on the mat. 

2. Move your hands towards the side with the fully extended leg, gently rotating your torso to get a light stretch. 

3. Slowly bring your torso down tow

name: Modified Pretzel on Elbows
description:
1. Start seated with both knees bent to 90 degrees. 

2. Drop the outside of one knee down to the mat, then drop the inside of the other knee down to the mat. 

3. Rotate your body and drop your torso so that your elbows are on the floor behind your legs. 

4. Relax and breathe in this positio

name: Modified Pretzel with Side Bend
description:
1. Start seated with both legs bent to 90 degrees. Lower the outside of one knee to the floor, and the inside of the opposite knee also. 

2. Move your hands towards the leg with the outside of the knee on the mat, gently rotating your torso to get a light stretch. 

3. Slowly lower your torso t

name: Modified V-Up
description:
1. Start by lying on your back on the mat, with hands extended overhead. 

2. Using momentum, drive your hands upward and bring your torso up off the mat. 

3. Tuck your heels in towards your hips and bring your hands towards your heels. 

4. Slowly return to the start position.

name: Monkey Crawl
description:
1) Start in a position with your knuckles (or hands) placed on the ground, off set from your knees with your hand outside the knee in the direction you plan on traveling. 

2) Next, load your body weight over your knuckles/hands. Your core should engage as you slowly lift your legs off the ground,

name: Mountain Climber
description:
1) Begin in a pushup position, with your weight supported by your hands and toes. 

2) Flexing the knee and hip, bring one leg until the knee is approximately under the hip. This will be your starting position. 

3) Explosively reverse the positions of your legs, extending the bent leg until the

name: Mountain Climbers to Plank Jack
description: Drive your knees forward from a plank (mountain climbers), then jump your feet in and out from a plank.

name: Narrow Grip Lat Pulldown
description:
1.Lean back and look up while holding the bar using a closed grip, with arms extended straight overhead.

2.Pull the bar down toward your chest. Lean back.

3.Straighten your arms completely, returning the handle to the starting position.

4.Remain upright throughout and do not sway back and f

name: Narrow shoulder press into tricep ext
Narrow Squats
description: Narrow Squats

name: Negative Pull Up  Benefits, Technique, How to Use in Your Workouts
description: Negative Pull Up  Benefits, Technique, How to Use in Your Workouts

name: Neutral frontal raises w/ steering wheel twist
Neutral Shoulder Press for Side Delts : Weightlifting Techniques
description: Neutral Shoulder Press for Side Delts : Weightlifting Techniques

name: Oblique Crunch
description:
1) Lie on your side with one leg on 90-degree angle and the other leg straight, one hand placed behind the neck for support, the other hand placed onto your oblique.

2) Slowly lift your head and shoulders up towards the ceiling.

3) Lower your head and shoulders returning to starting position.

name: Oblique Crunch Leg Raise
description:
1.Lie on your side with your head resting on one hand, the other hand placed on the floor against the chest, legs straight.

2.Slowly raise your legs, keeping them together.

3.Lower your legs returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Oblique Mountain Climbers
description: In a plank position, bring your knees toward the opposite elbows, engaging the obliques with each movement.

name: Overhead Forward Sled Drag
description:
1) When performing this exercise, you‚Äôll want to ensure that your arms are locked out over top of your head, biceps to ears.

2) You‚Äôll also want to slightly shorten the distance between the bottom of your ribs and top of your hips to keep your abdominals on and active.

name: P&C lat stretch
description: This stretch can be done on a couch or chair. Push hips back and allow roof for your face and spine to stay in line. Hold for about 30 seconds and then bring your hands together and back. Hold for 20-30 seconds.

name: P&C oblique arch
description: In this exercise we will be working the transverses, oblique, and the serratus anterior. Make sure the supporting arm is 90 degrees and you‚Äôre keeping the shoulder pulled down and back. No shrugging. I want you to pull your core in, kegel and try to pull yourself into a ‚Äúrainbow‚ÄĚ. Each time will imp

name: P&C SA isolated row/ scap pull
description: This exercise can be done with a cable or with a secured band. Adjust yourself far enough away that when your arm is full extended there is still some tension on the band or cable. Posture is upright and you can adjust your seat (booty) if needed. This tempo is slow about a 3:3 second count. 3 secon

name: P&C sacrum supported transverses pulls
description: For this exercise you will need to support you sacrum (this very low back into top of butt crack) with the yoga block. I prefer the block to be on its taller side, but you can use the shorter side if this is more comfortable. Completely relax and make sure your pelvis is supported comfortably. Legs

name: P&C serratus anterior roll front view
description: We are rolling out the serratus anterior muscle. When this muscle it accentuates anterior flexion of the arm. (Rolls shoulder forward) and inhibits overhead range of motion and reduces overall shoulder stability.

name: P&C serratus anterior roll posterior view
description:
Tips ** make sure the foam roller is right where the bra line would be. Yes this can be painful. Move slowly and range of motion will improve as we progress. 
We are rolling out the serratus anterior muscle. When this muscle it accentuates anterior flexion of the arm. (Rolls shoulder forward) and in

name: P&C table lifts adductor squeeze
description: Get into a table top position keeping hips over knees and shoulders pulled down away from ears. Squeeze the yoga block between your needs while doing a kegel hold. Pull core in nice a right (breath will be shallow) Slowly lift knees off the ground and return.

name: Pallof Press
description:
1.For this exercise, set the rollers at shoulder height. 

2.You‚Äôre gonna be focusing on your abdominals even though your arms will be moving. 

3.Have a nice soft knee bend and have a quiet body or a still body where you‚Äôre not moving.

4.With your side to the cable, grab the handle with both

name: Parallel Grip Lat Pulldown
description:
1.Lean back and grasp the handle using a closed grip with your arms extended straight overhead.

2.Pull the handle down in front to the top of your chest.

3.Straighten your arms completely, returning the handle to the starting position.

4.Remain upright throughout and do not sway back and fo

name: Parallel Grip Pull Up
description:
1.Grab a pull up bar in an upward fist position. Arms and legs straightened making your body hang.

2.Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar.

3.Lower your body returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Pass Through
description:
1.Stand upright holding a PVC pipe or wooden dowel in a wide grip.

2.Raise arms, passing the PVC pipe overhead, rotate the shoulder until the pipe touches lower back. The wider the grip, the easier it is. The narrower the grip, the more intense the stretch.

3.Reverse the movement to return to

name: Pelvic floor wall sit w/ db curl press
PFM DB alt lower leg lifts
description: Inhale and exhale, tuck pelvis in and flatten back to floor. Squeeze core tight and slightly lower Db behind head. Bring legs up to bent position and alternate lowering one at a time. Perform 8-10 and break, breathe and reset.

name: PFM hip hop w/ glute bridge adduction
description: Squeeze ball or towel between knees. Place hands under butt, breathe in and out to set your PFM and pull them into the floor. Lift glutes slighting off ground like a hop, place feet down and glute raise into a bridge. Keep core tight and squeeze the ball or towel tightly.

name: PFM kick tucks
description: Inhale abs exhale to active PFM , exhale and squeeze core, lift into table top position and kick one leg back and tuck your knee in and squeeze. Do 5 per side and reset with breathing. It is important to take breaks and not rush through these.

name: PFM progression table top knee taps
PFM table top block raises w/adduction
description: I want you to go into the rails top. Use a mirror to make sure your legs are 90 degrees and back is flat. Squeeze the block between knees and slowly lift knees up to hover. Hold 2-3 sec and come back down. I adjust my shirt here for you to see that my core is nice and tight and pulled in. This will

name: PFM table top knee taps
description: Deep breath in and out 2-3 times. Pull core tightly in, (this will make big breathes difficult) go into a table top position and tap the opposite knee with hand. Perform 5 per side. Come down and deep breath 2-3 times ... repeat

name: PFM wall activation
description: You will want shoes or bare feet so you do not slip. This is a pelvic floor activation movement. Keep your core tight and engaged. Push through your hands as if you are pushing the floor away from you. Hold for 5 sec and then individually tap each foot down. Hold again 5 sec and repeat. Reps will be

name: Pike Push Up to Reach
description:
Start in a pike position with hands and feet on the floor, hips raised toward the ceiling, forming an inverted ‚ÄúV.‚ÄĚ 

Perform a push-up by lowering your head toward the floor and then pressing back up to the pike position. 

After the push-up, alternate reaching each hand toward the opposite foo

name: Piked Push Up
description:
1.Get into push up position, palms flat on the floor and slightly more than shoulder-width apart, your feet should be together and your legs straight. 

2.Walk your feet towards your hand, lifting your butt into the air.

3.Press up through your shoulders, hold then return to starting position.

name: Pilates - (Bent Knee) Side-Lying Leg Lift
description: Lie on one side with knees bent. Lift the top leg while keeping the knee bent, engaging your glutes. Lower with control and repeat.

name: Pilates - Advanced Side Plank
description: Start in a side plank with one forearm on the mat. Stack your feet and lift your top arm toward the ceiling. Hold for balance or add hip dips for a challenge.

name: Pilates - Arm Reach with Ball under Ribs
description: Lie on your side with a ball under your ribs. Reach your arm overhead to stretch the side body.

name: Pilates - Ball Crunch
description: Lie on your back with knees bent and hold a ball at your chest. Perform a crunch while keeping the ball stable.

name: Pilates - Ball Pass
description: Lie on your back and hold a ball between your feet. Pass the ball to your hands as you crunch up, then extend back down.

name: Pilates - Bear Plank Adductor Squeeze
description: Start in a bear plank position (knees hovering above the mat). Place a ball or block between your knees and squeeze while holding the plank.

name: Pilates - Bicycle
description: Lie on your back, lift legs, alternate extending legs in a pedaling motion while twisting your torso to engage obliques.

name: Pilates - Control Balance
description: Lie on your back, lift legs overhead into a rollover position, extend one leg up while keeping the other in place, switch sides with control.

name: Pilates - Corkscrew
description: Lie on your back, lift legs to 90 degrees, engage the core, and draw controlled circular motions with both legs together.

name: Pilates - Donkey Kick to Cross Knee Tap
description: Start on hands and knees. Perform a donkey kick, then bring the knee across to tap the opposite elbow.

name: Pilates - Donkey Kick with Ball Below Knee
description: Start on hands and knees. Place a ball under one knee and press into it as you perform donkey kicks.

name: Pilates - Donkey Kick with Ball Between Knee
description: Start on hands and knees. Place a ball behind one knee and squeeze as you lift your foot toward the ceiling.

name: Pilates - Donkey Kicks
description: Start on hands and knees. Keep one knee bent as you lift the foot toward the ceiling. Lower and repeat before switching sides.

name: Pilates - Double Leg Kick
description: Lie on your stomach, clasp hands behind your back, lift the chest, and kick both legs towards the glutes before lowering.

name: Pilates - Double Leg Lower Lift
description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Engage your core and lower both legs down without arching your back, then lift them back up.

name: Pilates - Double Leg Stretch
description: Lie on your back, lift your head and shoulders, extend both arms and legs outward, then circle the arms back while drawing the knees in.

name: Pilates - Double-Leg Stretch with Ball Between Ankles
description: Lie on your back holding a ball between your ankles. Extend arms and legs out, then bring them back together.

name: Pilates - Frog
description: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet together. Extend legs out at an angle, then bring them back in while keeping control.

name: Pilates - Glute Bridge with Ball Squeeze
description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Place a ball between your knees and squeeze while lifting into a bridge.

name: Pilates - Glute Bridge with Feet on Ball
description: Lie on your back with feet on a ball. Lift your hips into a bridge while keeping balance.

name: Pilates - Glute Bridge with Marching
description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift hips into a bridge position and alternate lifting one foot at a time while keeping the hips stable.

name: Pilates - Hip Circles
description: Sit back slightly on your hands, extend legs to 45 degrees, and move them in a controlled circular motion.

name: Pilates - Inner Thigh Squeeze with Ball Between Knees
description: Lie on your back with knees bent and a ball between your knees. Squeeze the ball to engage your inner thighs.

name: Pilates - Ipsilateral Dead Bug with Ball
description: Start on hands and knees. Place a ball between one hand and opposite knee. Extend them out while keeping control.

name: Pilates - Jackknife
description: Lie on your back, lift legs overhead, then extend them straight up before lowering them back down with control.

name: Pilates - Kneeling Side Kick
description: Kneel on one knee with the other leg extended, kick the leg forward and backward with control.

name: Pilates - Leg Beats (Prone Position)
description: Lie on your stomach with legs extended. Lift your legs slightly and pulse them up and down in a controlled motion.

name: Pilates - Leg Pull Back
description: Sit with legs extended, hands behind hips, lift hips, and alternate lifting legs in a controlled motion.

name: Pilates - Leg Pull Front
description: Hold a plank position, lift one leg slightly, hold, then lower and repeat on the other side.

name: Pilates - Low Scissors
description: Lie on your back with legs extended. Lower one leg toward the mat while keeping the other lifted. Switch legs in a controlled scissor motion.

name: Pilates - Lunge with Side Stretch
description: Step into a lunge and reach one arm overhead to stretch the side body.

name: Pilates - Mermaid Stretch with Ball Under Side Hand
description: Sit with legs to one side and place a ball under your hand. Lean into the stretch to open the side body.

name: Pilates - Miniband Front to Back Lunge
description: Step one foot back into a lunge while keeping a miniband around your thighs. Alternate legs.

name: Pilates - Miniband Reverse Lunge to Knee Drive
description: Step back into a lunge, then drive the knee forward while keeping band resistance.

name: Pilates - Miniband Single Squat Leg Raise
description: Squat with a miniband around your thighs, then lift one leg to the side as you stand up.

name: Pilates - Miniband Split Lunge to Back Leg Raise
description: Perform a split lunge, then lift the back leg up while keeping tension on the band.

name: Pilates - Miniband Squat to Curtsy Lunge
description: Step one foot behind in a curtsey lunge while keeping the miniband around your thighs. Alternate sides.

name: Pilates - Modified Hundred (Feet on Mat)
description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift your head and shoulders, extend arms forward, and pulse them up and down while breathing in and out.

name: Pilates - Neck Pull
description: Lie on your back, hands behind your head, roll up slowly to a seated position, hinge forward, then roll back down with control.

name: Pilates - Oblique Roll-Back
description: Sit with knees bent and feet on the floor. Lean back slightly and rotate your torso to one side. Return to center and switch sides.

name: Pilates - Oblique Twists with Ball
description: Sit with knees bent and hold a ball in both hands. Rotate your torso side to side while keeping your core engaged.

name: Pilates - Open Leg Rocker Balance Hold
description: Sit with legs extended and slightly apart. Hold your ankles and balance while engaging your core.

name: Pilates - Open-Leg Rocker
description: Sit with legs extended in a V-shape, hold ankles, roll back onto shoulders, then roll forward to balance again.

name: Pilates - Overhead Arm Stretch with Ball Squeeze
description: Stand or sit tall and hold a ball overhead. Press into the ball as you stretch upward.

name: Pilates - Overhead Tricep Extension with Ball Squeeze
description: Hold a ball behind your head with both hands. Press into the ball while stretching your triceps.

name: Pilates - Plank to Pike
description: Start in a plank position. Engage your core and lift your hips toward the ceiling, then return to plank.

name: Pilates - Plank with Ball Under Toes
description: Start in a plank position with your toes on a ball. Engage your core to keep stable while holding the plank.

name: Pilates - Push-Up with Ball Under One Hand
description: Perform a push-up with one hand on a ball, challenging your stability and strength.

name: Pilates - Push-Ups (Pilates Style)
description: Begin in a plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulders. Lower your chest toward the mat, keeping elbows close to your body. Engage your core and push back up.

name: Pilates - Rocking
description: Lie on your stomach, grab ankles, and lift chest and legs off the mat while balancing on the abdomen.

name: Pilates - Roll Like a Ball with Ball Between Knees
description: Sit with knees bent and a ball between them. Roll back onto your shoulders and return to balance.

name: Pilates - Rolling Like a Ball
description: Sit on the mat, hug your knees to your chest, balance on your sit bones, then roll back onto your shoulders and return to the starting position smoothly.

name: Pilates - Rolling Like a Ball into Teaser
description: Start in a rolling like a ball position. Roll back, then extend your legs into a teaser position before rolling back again.

name: Pilates - Roll-Up
description: Lie flat, extend arms overhead. Roll up one vertebra at a time, reaching towards toes, then slowly roll back down with control.

name: Pilates - Roll-Up with Ball Between Knees
description: Lie on your back with a ball between your knees. Engage your core and roll up to a seated position, then roll back down.

name: Pilates - Saw
description: Sit with legs wide apart, extend arms, rotate the torso, and reach one hand toward the opposite foot, alternating sides.

name: Pilates - Scissors
description: Lie on your back, lift both legs, then alternate lowering and lifting each leg while engaging your core.

name: Pilates - Seal
description: Sit with soles of feet together, wrap hands around ankles, rock back onto shoulders, then return to balance while clapping feet together.

name: Pilates - Seated Forward Fold
description: Sit with legs extended and reach forward toward your toes while keeping your back long.

name: Pilates - Seated Russian Twist with Ball
description: Sit with knees bent and hold a ball. Twist your torso side to side while keeping the ball controlled.

name: Pilates - Shoulder Bridge
description: Lie on your back, bend knees, lift hips towards the ceiling, squeeze glutes, then lower with control.

name: Pilates - Side Kick Series (Circles)
description: Lie on your side, make controlled circular motions with the top leg, keeping hips steady.

name: Pilates - Side Kick Series (Front/Back)
description: Lie on your side, lift the top leg, kick it forward and backward while keeping hips stable.

name: Pilates - Side Kick Series (Up/Down)
description: Lie on your side, lift the top leg up and lower it with control, keeping the core engaged.

name: Pilates - Side Kick Series with Ball Under Ribs
description: Lie on your side with a ball under your ribs. Perform side kicks while maintaining balance.

name: Pilates - Side Kneeling Oblique Pulldown Miniband
description: Kneel on one side and hold a miniband overhead. Pull the band down while crunching your obliques.

name: Pilates - Side Kneeling Oblique Twist
description: Kneel on one side with one hand on the floor and the other behind your head. Twist your torso down, then return to starting position.

name: Pilates - Side Lying Develop√©
description: Lie on your side with the bottom leg bent for support. Point the top toe and slowly lift the leg, extending it fully in a controlled, upward arc. Lower with precision. Focus on length and control.

name: Pilates - Side Lying Oblique Leg Lift
description: Lie on your side with legs extended. Lift the top leg while engaging the obliques.

name: Pilates - Side Lying Oblique Leg Pulse
description: Lie on your side and lift your top leg slightly. Pulse the leg up and down while engaging the obliques.

name: Pilates - Side-Lying Inner Thigh Circles
description: Lie on one side with the bottom leg extended. Lift the leg slightly and make small controlled circles, engaging the inner thigh.

name: Pilates - Side-Lying Inner Thigh Lifts
description: Lie on one side and extend the bottom leg while keeping the top leg bent. Lift the bottom leg, engaging the inner thigh. Lower and repeat.

name: Pilates - Side-Lying Leg Lifts with Ball Between Ankles
description: Lie on your side with a ball between your ankles. Lift and lower your legs together in a controlled motion.

name: Pilates - Single Leg Circle Left (Contralateral)
description: Perform the same movement as the right side, drawing controlled circles with the left leg while keeping hips stable.

name: Pilates - Single Leg Circle Right (Contralateral)
description: Lie on your back, extend one leg upward, engage your core, and draw controlled circles with the leg while keeping hips stable.

name: Pilates - Single Leg Kick
description: Lie on your stomach, support yourself on forearms, and kick one leg towards your glutes, alternating sides.

name: Pilates - Single Leg Stretch
description: Lie on your back, lift your head and shoulders, extend one leg while pulling the opposite knee towards the chest, alternating sides.

name: Pilates - Single Leg Stretch with Twist
description: Lie on your back, lift your head and shoulders, and extend one leg while twisting your torso toward the bent knee. Switch sides in a controlled manner.

name: Pilates - Spine Stretch Forward
description: Sit with legs extended, reach arms forward, inhale to lengthen, then exhale as you reach forward, stretching the spine.

name: Pilates - Spine Stretch Forward with Ball Between Hands
description: Sit with legs extended and hold a ball. Reach forward, keeping the spine long.

name: Pilates - Spine Twist
description: Sit tall with legs extended, extend arms to the sides, twist the torso from side to side while keeping the core engaged.

name: Pilates - Squats with Ball Between Thighs
description: Stand with feet hip-width apart and a ball between your thighs. Lower into a squat while squeezing the ball.

name: Pilates - Standing Lunges with Ball Under Front Foot
description: Place a ball under your front foot while in a lunge position. Lower and lift with control.

name: Pilates - Standing Roll-Down
description: Stand tall, then slowly roll down one vertebra at a time, reaching for your toes. Reverse the movement to stand up.

name: Pilates - Standing Side Bend with Ball Between Hands
description: Stand tall and hold a ball between your hands. Bend side to side, keeping the core engaged.

name: Pilates - Static Glute Bridge with Heel Lifts
description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift hips into a bridge, then lift and lower your heels while maintaining the position.

name: Pilates - Swan
description: Lie on your stomach, place hands under shoulders, engage your back muscles, and lift the chest while keeping legs on the floor.

name: Pilates - Swan with Ball
description: Lie on your stomach with a ball under your chest. Press up into a swan stretch while keeping control.

name: Pilates - Swimming
description: Lie on your stomach, lift opposite arm and leg simultaneously in a fluttering motion, engaging the back and glutes.

name: Pilates - Swimming into Child‚Äôs Pose
description: Lie on your stomach and flutter your arms and legs. Then push back into child's pose for a stretch.

name: Pilates - Teaser I
description: Lie on your back, lift legs to 45 degrees, roll up to balance on your sit bones with arms extended forward.

name: Pilates - Teaser II
description: Perform Teaser I but focus on slower movement control as you lower back down.

name: Pilates - Teaser III
description: Lift both legs and upper body together into a V-sit position, balancing on your sit bones.

name: Pilates - Teaser with Ball Between Knees
description: Lie on your back and hold a ball between your knees. Engage your core and lift into a teaser position.

name: Pilates - The Hundred
description: Lie on your back, lift your head, neck, and shoulders, extend legs at 45 degrees. Pump arms up and down while inhaling for five counts and exhaling for five counts, totaling 100 pumps.

name: Pilates - Toe Taps with Ball Under Lower Back
description: Lie on your back with a small ball under your lower back. Tap one foot to the mat at a time while maintaining core control.

name: Pilates - Twist (Side Plank to twist)
description: Hold a side plank, rotate your torso, and thread the top arm under your body before returning.

name: Pilates - Walkout to Push up
description: Perform a Pilates push-up with a ball under your chest for added challenge.

name: Pilates - Wide Second pli√© - Alternating Heel Raises
description: In a deep pli√©, lift one heel off the floor, then lower and switch to the other heel. Keep the body stable and thighs engaged throughout.

name: Pilates - Wide Second pli√© - Full Range
description: Stand with feet wide and toes turned out. Lower into a deep pli√©, then return to standing.

name: Pilates - Wide Second pli√© - Pulses
description: From the deep pli√© position, stay low and pulse up and down in small, controlled movements. Maintain tension through the thighs and glutes.

name: Pilates - Wide second pli√© to split lunge
description: Start in a wide pli√© squat. Pivot on your feet and drop into a split lunge, then return to center and repeat on the other side. Use your core to stabilize the transition.

description:
Start in a bird dog position on the floor: hands and knees with your back flat, core engaged, and place one hand on top of a Pilates ball.

3Return to starting position.

description:
Start in a high plank position with a dumbbell placed on the floor to one side of your body.

2.Raise your body up into the top of a push up position, resting on your hand and toes and hold briefly. Keep your back flat and head looking down at the floor.

description:
1. When performing this exercise, maintain a neutral spine  and lift the plate from the floor with your glutes rather than your lower back.

2. Keep your abdominals engaged and pulled in.

name: Plate Russian Twist

name: Plate slide reverse lunges
description: The glute muscle from the leg in front should be driving this motion. If you can not feel it lean forward slightly.

name: Plate Weighted Crunch
description:
1.Lie flat on your back holding a weight extended above your body, arms straight., your feet flat on the ground, knees bent at a 90-degree angle.

2.Slowly get off the floor bringing your shoulders towards your knees.

3.Lower down your shoulders returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Plate Weighted Dip
description:
1) Strap a weighted dip belt around your waist and grip the dip bars shoulder width apart with arms straight. 

2) Lower your body until you feel a stretch in your shoulders. Then push body back up to the starting position. 

3) Repeat.

name: Plate Weighted Wide Grip Pull Up
description:
1) Strap a weighted dip belt around your waist and grasp a pull up bar. 

2) Start by pulling your body up until your chin passes the bar. 

3) Pause, and lower your body until your arms are extended. 

4) Repeat.

name: Plate-Loaded Incline Machine Seated Chest Press
description: Sit with your back against the pad and grip the handles. Press upward and outward until your arms are extended. Slowly return to the starting position.

name: Plyometric Push Up
description:
1.Lie face down on a mat with your legs straight, feet together, hands on the floor.

2.Push yourself up through elbow extension as quickly as possible, up until your hands leave the ground.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Pogo Hops
description: Perform small, quick jumps, staying on the balls of your feet and using minimal knee bend.

name: Pop Squats
description:

3. Lift your head up about an inch off the mat and hold that position.

Return to start and switch sides. Engage your glutes and hips.

description:

2.Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar.

3.Lower your body returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Push Up
description:

2.Push your body upwards and straighten your arms.

3.Lower your body returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

3) Pause, and slowly return to starting position.

description: Start in a standing position, then bend forward and walk your hands out on the floor until you‚Äôre in a plank. From the plank, lift one hand and tap the opposite shoulder, then switch hands. Walk your hands back to standing and repeat.

name: Walkouts
description:
1. Start by standing with feet shoulder-width apart. 

2. Reach your hands down towards the mat, and slowly walk your hands all the way out to a plank position.

3. While keeping your hips in line, and abdomen tight, walk your hands all the way back up to the standing position.

2) Try to keep your knees at 90 degrees and hold.

Warrior 2 Pull to Press

description: Flow through a series of yoga warrior poses: Warrior 1, Warrior 2, and Warrior 3, focusing on balance, strength, and flexibility.

name: Weight Vest Butterfly Pull Up
description:
1. Wearing a weighted vest, start by gripping a pull-up bar with a grip slightly wider than shoulder-width. 

2. Initiate the movement with the shoulders, pushing your body into an arched back position. 

3. From the arched position, lift your hips and legs straight up towards the bar, pulling y

name: Weight Vest Pull Up
description:
1. Start by wearing a weighted vest and gripping a pull up bar at shoulder-width.

2. Pull yourself up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar height. 

3. Slowly return to the start position and repeat.

name: Weighted Chin Up
description:
1.Wearing a weight belt, grab a pull up bar, palms facing you. Arms and legs straightened making your body hang.

2.Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar.

3.Lower your body returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Weighted Feet Up Crunch
description:
1.Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet raised, holding a dumbbell up over your chest with your arms straight.

2.Lift your head and shoulders off the floor, keeping your feet raised and arms straight.

3.Lower your head and shoulders returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Weighted Full Sit Up
description:
1) Perform a normal sit-up exercise. 

2) Hug a weighted plate across your chest to add resistance.

name: Weighted Parallel Grip Pull Up
description:
1.Wearing a weight belt, grab a pull up bar in an upward fist position. Arms and legs straightened making your body hang.

2.Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar.

3.Lower your body returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
description:
1.Lean back holding a bar using a shoulder-width grip with your arms extended straight overhead.

2.Pull the bar down in front to the top of your chest, bending at the elbows.

3.Straighten your arms fully, returning the bar to the starting position.

4.Repeat.

name: Wide Grip Pull Up
description:
1) Grab a pull up bar with an overhand grip, arms straightened, your body is hanging.

2) Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar. 

3) Once your lats have completely contracted at the top, lower your body returning to starting position.

4) Repeat.

name: Wide grip table pulls
description: Keep hands wider then shoulders. Bend knees , the closer your feet are to your body the easier these are to perform. If you want more resistance keep legs straight out in front of you.

name: Wide Stance Forward Fold
description: Stand with feet wide and hinge at the hips to fold forward, stretching your hamstrings and lower back.

name: Wide stance knee to elbows
description: Push up position with feet wider then hips (either side of mat) keep core tight. Alternate right knee to left elbow and left knee to right elbow

name: xx
description: If the bosu is too challenging you can do this exercise on the floor, or fold a mat and stand on that to create less stability.

name: Yoga - Boat Pose (Navasana)
description: Sit with knees bent, lift your feet off the floor, and extend your legs, keeping the spine straight. Hold your legs or extend arms parallel to the floor.

name: Yoga - Bound Angle Pose (Baddha Konasana)
description: Sit with feet together, knees bent out to the sides, and hold your feet with your hands, gently pressing your knees toward the floor.

name: Yoga - Bow Pose (Dhanurasana)
description: Lie on your stomach, grab your ankles, and lift your chest and legs off the floor, pulling your feet toward your head while opening the chest.

name: Yoga - Bridge Pose (Setu Bandhasana)
description: Lie on your back, bend your knees with feet flat on the floor, and lift your hips toward the ceiling, pressing your feet and arms into the ground.

name: Yoga - Camel Pose (Ustrasana)
description: Kneel with knees hip-width apart, press your hands onto your lower back, and lift your chest toward the ceiling while gently arching your back.

name: Yoga - Cat-Cow Stretch (Marjaryasana-Bitilasana)
description: Start on all fours, alternate between arching your back (Cat) and dipping your spine toward the mat (Cow), syncing movement with breath.

name: Yoga - Center Split
description: From a standing or seated position, slowly open your legs wide and lower your torso toward the floor, keeping the legs straight.

name: Yoga - Chair Pose (Utkatasana)
description: From standing, bend your knees deeply as if sitting in a chair, and extend your arms overhead, keeping weight in your heels.

name: Yoga - Chaturanga Dandasana
description: From Plank Pose, lower your body halfway to the floor, keeping your elbows close to your body and your core engaged.

name: Yoga - Child‚Äôs Pose (Balasana)
description: Start in a kneeling position, bring your big toes together, and sit back on your heels. Stretch your arms forward and lower your forehead to the floor.

name: Yoga - Cobra Pose (Bhujangasana)
description: Lie face down, press palms into the floor, and lift your chest by straightening your arms while keeping your elbows slightly bent.

name: Yoga - Cow Face Pose (Gomukhasana)
description: Sit with knees stacked on top of each other, one leg bent and the other crossed over, and reach arms behind to clasp hands.

name: Yoga - Crescent Lunge (Anjaneyasana)
description: Step one foot forward and bend the knee to 90 degrees, extending the other leg straight back and lifting your arms overhead with palms facing each other.

name: Yoga - Crow Pose (Bakasana)
description: Start in a squat, place your hands on the floor, and lift your hips high, balancing your knees on your upper arms as you engage your core.

name: Yoga - Crow to Chaturanga Flow
description: Start in Crow Pose, slowly transition into Chaturanga Dandasana by shifting forward and lowering the chest toward the floor.

name: Yoga - Dancer‚Äôs Pose (Natarajasana)
description: Stand on one leg, bend the other knee and grab the ankle, extending the opposite arm forward, while lifting the back leg behind you.

name: Yoga - Dancing Warrior Sequence
description: Flow from Warrior I to Warrior II, then extend the arms and bend backward into Reverse Warrior, and move into Wild Thing.

name: Yoga - Dolphin Plank
description: Start in forearm plank position, keeping your body in a straight line, and engage the core and legs.

name: Yoga - Downward-Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana)
description: From all fours, lift your hips high, straighten your legs, and press your heels toward the floor while keeping your hands shoulder-width apart and feet hip-width apart.

name: Yoga - Eagle Pose (Garudasana)
description: Cross one leg over the other, wrapping the foot around the standing leg, and cross your arms in front, bringing palms together.

name: Yoga - Easy Pose (Sukhasana)
description: Sit with legs crossed, hands resting on your knees, and spine tall. Relax the shoulders and focus on steady breathing.

name: Yoga - Extended Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose
description: Stand on one leg, extend the other leg forward and hold the big toe with your hand while keeping your other arm extended out.

name: Yoga - Extended Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose, Open
description: From the Extended Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose, open your extended leg to the side, keeping the core engaged and balance steady.

name: Yoga - Extended Side Angle Pose (Utthita Parsvakonasana)
description: From Warrior II, bend the front knee and bring your forearm to your thigh or hand to the floor, extending the opposite arm overhead.

name: Yoga - Extended Side Plank
description: From a regular plank, rotate your body to one side and lift the top arm toward the ceiling, stacking your feet and keeping your body in a straight line.

name: Yoga - Fire Log Pose (Agnistambhasana)
description: Sit with one leg stacked over the other, keeping the knees aligned and the feet flexed. Fold forward for a deeper stretch.

name: Yoga - Forearm Stand (Pincha Mayurasana)
description: Start in Downward-Facing Dog, bring forearms to the ground, and lift your legs to the sky, keeping the core engaged and balance steady.

name: Yoga - Frog Pose (Mandukasana)
description: Start on all fours, widen your knees and keep your feet flexed, then lower your hips towards the floor, stretching the inner thighs and hips.

name: Yoga - Full Split
description: From Half Split, deepen the stretch by lowering the hips to the floor and extending both legs fully straight.

name: Yoga - Garland Pose (Malasana)
description: Squat deeply with feet wide apart, keeping your heels on the floor, and bring your palms together in front of your chest while pushing your elbows against your inner knees.

name: Yoga - Half Frog Pose (Ardha Bhekasana)
description: Lie on your stomach, bend one knee, and bring the foot towards your glutes while reaching for the ankle with the opposite hand.

name: Yoga - Half Lord of the Fishes Pose (Ardha Matsyendrasana)
description: Sit with one leg bent in front of you and the other leg crossed over. Twist your torso toward the top leg while keeping the spine long.

name: Yoga - Half Moon Pose (Ardha Chandrasana)
description: From a standing position, shift weight onto one leg, extend the other leg parallel to the floor, and raise the opposite arm toward the ceiling.

name: Yoga - Half Split
description: From a lunge position, straighten the front leg and fold forward, keeping the hips squared and stretching the hamstrings.

name: Yoga - Happy Baby Pose (Ananda Balasana)
description: Lie on your back, grab the outsides of your feet, and pull your knees toward your armpits, keeping the feet flexed.

name: Yoga - Hero Pose (Virasana)
description: Sit with your knees bent, feet under your hips, and thighs on the floor. Keep your spine tall, resting your hands on your thighs.

name: Yoga - Hero Pose Reclining
description: From Hero Pose, slowly recline your torso back, bringing your hands behind you or using props for support.

name: Yoga - King Cobra Pose
description: Lie on your stomach, place your palms near your chest, and lift your torso while bending your elbows slightly, arching the back deeply.

name: Yoga - King Pigeon Pose (Eka Pada Rajakapotasana)
description: From Downward Dog, bring one knee toward your hands, extend the back leg, and lower your torso down, reaching arms overhead.

name: Yoga - Knee to Nose to Fallen Triangle
description: From Three-Legged Dog, bring your knee to your nose, then open your hips to fall into a side plank position, creating a Fallen Triangle.

name: Yoga - Lizard Pose (Utthan Pristhasana)
description: From Downward Dog, bring one foot forward between your hands, and lower your hips, keeping your back leg straight and hands on the floor or a block.

name: Yoga - Lizard Pose with Quad Stretch
description: From Lizard Pose, bend your back knee and reach for the foot with the opposite hand to stretch the quadriceps while deepening the hip stretch.

name: Yoga - Locust Pose (Salabhasana) A
description: Retrieving data. Wait a few seconds and try to cut or copy again.

name: Yoga - Locust Pose (Salabhasana) B
description: Lie face down, extend your arms back by your sides, and lift your chest and legs while keeping your legs straight and the feet flexed.

name: Yoga - Locust Pose Contemporary
description: Same as Locust Pose, but with hands clasped behind your back and shoulders pulling away from your ears as you lift the chest and legs.

name: Yoga - Lotus Pose (Padmasana)
description: Sit with legs crossed, placing each foot on the opposite thigh. Keep the spine tall and hands resting on your knees.

name: Yoga - Low Boat Pose (Ardha Navasana)
description: Lie on your back, lift your legs and torso off the floor, and balance on your sit bones while keeping your arms extended in front of you.

name: Yoga - Low Lunge to High Lunge Flow
description: From Downward Dog, step one foot forward into a low lunge, then transition into a High Lunge by lifting the back leg and raising arms overhead.

name: Yoga - Marichi‚Äôs Pose (Marichyasana)
description: Sit with one leg bent in front of you and the other leg extended. Twist your torso toward the bent leg, placing one hand on the floor behind you and the other holding the bent leg.

name: Yoga - Mountain Pose (Tadasana)
description: Stand tall with feet together, arms by your sides, and weight evenly distributed on both feet. Engage your thighs, lift your chest, and lengthen your spine.

name: Yoga - One-Legged Wheel Pose
description: Begin in Wheel Pose, then lift one leg off the floor, keeping your arms strong and engaged while supporting your balance.

name: Yoga - Pigeon Pose (Kapotasana)
description: From Downward Dog, bring one knee forward toward your hands, extend the back leg, and lower your torso toward the floor, keeping the back leg straight and the chest lifted.

name: Yoga - Plow Pose (Halasana)
description: From Shoulder Stand, lower your feet to the floor behind your head while keeping your legs straight and your arms extended on the floor.

name: Yoga - Press Handstand Split
description: From standing, hinge at your hips, press your hands into the floor, and slowly lift your legs into a split, aiming for balance in the handstand.

name: Yoga - Puppy Pose (Anahatasana)
description: Start in Child‚Äôs Pose, walk your hands forward, and lower your chest toward the floor, stretching the arms and chest deeply.

name: Yoga - Reclined Bound Angle Pose (Supta Baddha Konasana)
description: Lie on your back, bring the soles of your feet together, and allow your knees to fall outward, relaxing the hips and inner thighs.

name: Yoga - Reclining Toe Hold (Supta Padangusthasana)
description: Lie on your back, extend one leg toward the sky, and hold the big toe with your hand, keeping the other leg grounded on the floor.

name: Yoga - Reverse Warrior (Viparita Virabhadrasana)
description: From Warrior II, flip your front palm, lean back, and stretch your arm up and over, creating a deep side stretch.

name: Yoga - Revolved Chair Pose (Parivrtta Utkatasana)
description: From Chair Pose, twist your torso toward the front leg and place your opposite elbow on the outside of the bent knee, keeping your chest lifted.

name: Yoga - Revolved Head-to-Knee Pose (Parivrtta Janu Sirsasana)
description: Sit with one leg extended, bend the other knee, and twist your torso toward the bent leg, extending the arm toward the foot of the straight leg.

name: Yoga - Revolved Side Angle Pose (Parivrtta Parsvakonasana)
description: From Side Angle Pose, twist your torso toward the front leg, placing the opposite hand on the floor while keeping the back leg straight.

name: Yoga - Revolved Triangle Pose (Parivrtta Trikonasana)
description: From Triangle Pose, twist your torso toward the front leg, placing your opposite hand on the floor or a block, while keeping both legs straight.

name: Yoga - Seated Forward Bend (Paschimottanasana)
description: Sit with legs extended straight in front of you, reach for your feet, and fold forward, lengthening the spine while keeping the chest open.

name: Yoga - Seated Side Stretch
description: Sit with legs extended, reach one arm overhead, and lean to the opposite side, stretching the side of the body.

name: Yoga - Seated Spinal Twist
description: Sit with legs crossed. Rotate your torso to one side, using your opposite hand on your knee for support.

name: Yoga - Shoulder Stand (Sarvangasana)
description: Lie on your back, lift your legs overhead, and support your lower back with your hands while extending your legs toward the ceiling.

name: Yoga - Side Crow Pose (Parsva Bakasana)
description: From a squat, twist your torso to one side, placing the opposite arm across the thighs, and balance on the hands while keeping the legs lifted.

name: Yoga - Sphinx Pose
description: Lie on your stomach and prop yourself up on your forearms, lifting your chest for a gentle backbend.

name: Yoga - Staff Pose (Dandasana)
description: Sit with legs extended straight in front of you, feet flexed, and hands placed beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.

name: Yoga - Standing Forward Fold (Uttanasana)
description: From standing, hinge at your hips, keeping a slight bend in the knees, and fold forward, reaching for your toes or placing hands on the floor.

name: Yoga - Standing Splits (Urdhva Prasarita Eka Padasana)
description: From a standing position, hinge at your hips, extending one leg straight up toward the sky, and reach your hands to the floor or your supporting leg.

name: Yoga - Sun Salutation A (Surya Namaskar A)
description: Start in Mountain Pose, inhale and raise your arms, exhale into Forward Fold, inhale to Half Lift, exhale to Plank, lower to Chaturanga, inhale to Upward Dog, exhale to Downward Dog, and repeat the flow.

name: Yoga - Sun Salutation B (Surya Namaskar B)
description: A variation of Sun Salutation A, adding Warrior I and Chair Pose between the standard movements.

name: Yoga - Supine Twist (Jathara Parivartanasana)
description: Lie on your back, bring your knees to your chest, and drop them to one side while keeping your shoulders grounded.

name: Yoga - Three-Legged Dog to Knee-to-Nose Flow
description: From Downward Dog, lift one leg to the sky, then bring the knee toward your nose and shift into a plank position.

name: Yoga - Tree Pose (Vrksasana)
description: Stand on one leg, place the sole of the other foot on your inner thigh or calf (avoid the knee), and raise your arms overhead with palms together.

name: Yoga - Triangle Pose (Trikonasana)
description: Stand with feet wide apart, extend arms, and bend at the waist over one leg, bringing the hand to the floor or a block and the other arm reaching toward the ceiling.

name: Yoga - Upward-Facing Dog (Urdhva Mukha Svanasana)
description: Lie face down, press your palms into the floor, and lift your chest and hips, straightening your arms while keeping your legs off the floor.

name: Yoga - Warrior I (Virabhadrasana I)
description: Step one foot back, bend the front knee, and raise both arms overhead. Keep hips square and the back leg straight.

name: Yoga - Warrior II (Virabhadrasana II)
description: From Warrior I, open your hips and shoulders, extending arms parallel to the floor and palms facing down.

name: Yoga - Warrior II to Reverse Warrior Flow
description: From Warrior II, transition into Reverse Warrior by flipping your front palm, reaching your arm back, and keeping the hips open.

name: Yoga - Warrior III (Virabhadrasana III)
description: From standing, shift weight onto one leg, extend the other leg back, and reach arms forward, creating a straight line from fingertips to toes.

name: Yoga - Wheel Pose (Chakrasana)
description: Lie on your back, place your hands and feet on the floor, and press up, creating an arch with your body while engaging your arms and legs.

name: Yoga - Wide-Angle Seated Forward Bend (Upavistha Konasana)
description: Sit with legs extended wide apart, hinge at the hips, and fold forward, keeping your spine long and engaging your inner thighs.

name: Yoga - Wide-Legged Forward Fold (Prasarita Padottanasana)
description: Stand with legs wide apart, hinge at your hips, and fold forward, bringing your head toward the ground and hands under your shoulders.

name: Yoga - Wild Thing (Camatkarasana)
description: From Downward Dog, flip onto the outer edge of one foot, and lift the other leg and arm toward the sky, arching your back.

name: Zottman Curl
description:
1) Stand and hold two dumbbells with arms hanging down on both sides. 

2) Curl both dumbbells up towards your shoulders and when you reach the top, rotate your wrists so that your palms face downwards. 

3) Lower the weights to the starting position as your palms face downwards.
 
4) Repeat.
